cards.back: A flexible approach to software development that emphasizes iterative and incremental progress, continuous improvement, and customer collaboration
A reusable solution to a common problem in software design, applicable to multiple contexts and frameworks
A linear, phased approach to software development, where each phase is completed before moving on to the next one
A methodology where the software is developed in small, manageable increments, with continuous feedback and refinement
A methodology where the software is developed in cycles, with each cycle building on the previous one, and feedback is used to refine the development process
